name: Weather Control
description: Professional weather effects plugin with community weather gamification, quests, streaks, rewards, and rain, snow, storm, fog, thunder, sunbeam, glitchclouds, aurora, fireflies, meteors, sakura, embers, and heatwave effects for TikTok Live overlays
author: Pup Cid

descriptions.en: Professional weather effects plugin with 13 stream overlay effects, community gamification, presets, sequences, audio, event triggers, quality controls, and per-effect layering.
descriptions.de: Professionelles Wettereffekt-Plugin mit 13 Stream-Overlay-Effekten, Community-Gamification, Presets, Sequenzen, Audio, Event-Triggern, Qualitaetssteuerung und Layering pro Effekt.
descriptions.es: Plugin profesional de efectos climaticos con 13 efectos de overlay, gamificacion comunitaria, presets, secuencias, audio, disparadores de eventos, calidad configurable y capas por efecto.
descriptions.fr: Plugin professionnel d'effets meteo avec 13 effets d'overlay, gamification communautaire, presets, sequences, audio, declencheurs d'evenements, qualite configurable et calques par effet.
